summary: The account-history pruning divergence is rustfmt-only noise: semicolons on existing early returns and a test predicate line wrap.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 259: M	crates/prune/prune/src/segments/user/account_history.rs.

No account-history pruning range, limiter, checkpoint, or expected-pruned-block behavior changed.
